metadata.description: Plugins for Affinity CRM - Python SDK, CLI, and MCP integrations

plugins.name: affinity-crm-sdk-unofficial
plugins.description: Python SDK for Affinity CRM — write scripts to search, export, filter, and automate CRM data with typed IDs, async/sync clients, and built-in pagination

plugins.name: affinity-crm-cli-xaffinity-unofficial
plugins.description: Affinity CRM command-line tools — search contacts, export lists to CSV, filter pipelines, and manage CRM data via xaffinity

plugins.name: affinity-crm-mcp-unofficial
plugins.description: Affinity CRM workflows for Claude — meeting prep, pipeline review, warm intros, interaction logging, and relationship intelligence
